title: Just Not Vanilla
description: A 1.20.4 vanilla-adjacent modpack featuring Fixed Minecraft, Deeper and Darker, and Immersive Portals!
body:
This modpack was created to feature the mod ["Fixed Minecraft"](https://modrinth.com/mod/fixed), which gives a snapshot of what Minecraft could be like if there was a new balance to the game's core mechanics. To add some spice for those who are used to a modded experience, but trying to get back into Vanilla, [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) was added alongside [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals) (with its sister mods [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) and [Gravity Changer API](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-api-fork)).

With custom resources and data packs to complement [Xali's Potions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-potions) and add parity with Deeper and Darker, Fixed Minecraft and Gravity Changer API, this modpack offers an integrated experience different from kitchen-sink modpacks.

Chock-full of performance mods and running on the lowest settings by default pretty much any computer should be able to run this well enough, but that doesn't mean it can't take advantage of more powerful systems-- Both [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) and [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) are featured as well. The modpack comes with [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) by default, as it's shown to be the most compatible with the included mods (Bliss Shaders is unfortunately quite glitchy with most of the mods that interact with rendering).

Using resource packs from [creepermax123](https://www.curseforge.com/members/creepermax123/projects), [Unearthed](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unearthed), and [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/).
